actions.expr: Establish the connection as described in the QUIC transport specification [RFC9000]

provenance.anchor: established as described in the QUIC transport specification
provenance.source_text:
DoQ connections are established as described in the QUIC transport
specification [RFC9000].

conditions.expr: DoQ support is to be indicated

actions.expr: Select the Application-Layer Protocol Negotiation (ALPN) token "doq" in the crypto handshake

provenance.source_text:
During connection establishment, DoQ support is
indicated by selecting the Application-Layer Protocol Negotiation (ALPN) token "doq" in the crypto handshake.
